artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA interface showing the Variable Speed Drive Faceplate for High Serv. Pump No.1, displaying configuration parameters and an empty alarms section.
artifact_key_elements: Cold and hot restart time frames
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system screenshot presenting the Variable Speed Drive Faceplate for High Serv. Pump No.1. The interface details specific operational configuration parameters, including defined cold and hot restart time frames, fault restart delays, and failure delays, while the alarms section remains currently empty.
